name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Execution via stordiag
notes:
This Building Block detects the use of stordiag.exe to execute schtasks.exe systeminfo.exe and fltmc.exe.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Austin Songer (@austinsonger)
SIGMA Title: Execution via stordiag.exe
SIGMA Description: Detects the use of stordiag.exe to execute schtasks.exe systeminfo.exe and fltmc.exe

Confidence: LOW

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Execution via stordiag on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches Parent Process Name (custom) is any of stordiag.exe
when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of [schtasks.exe or systeminfo.exe or fltmc.exe]
when the event matches Parent Process Path (custom) contains any of [c:\windows\syswow64\ or c:\windows\system32\]
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Execution via stordiag on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
AND when the event matches Parent Process Name (custom) is any of stordiag.exe
AND when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of [schtasks.exe or systeminfo.exe or fltmc.exe]
AND NOT when the event matches Parent Process Path (custom) contains any of [c:\windows\syswow64\ or c:\windows\system32\]
